hero.subheadline: Real-time IoT telemetry to optimize equipment usage, reduce wait times, and maximize your clients' satisfaction

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Revolutionize the fitness industry through IoT solutions that allow gyms to operate more efficiently and clients to train without interruptions.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be the leading telemetry platform in Peru for intelligent gym management, setting the standard in equipment monitoring technology.

product.title: Product
product.description: A complete SaaS platform that combines Edge IoT sensors, cloud storage, and predictive analytics to transform the gym experience.

iotSensors.title: Edge IoT Sensors
iotSensors.description: Telemetry hardware installed on every machine to detect usage in real time without manual intervention.

cloudStorage.title: Cloud Storage
cloudStorage.description: Secure and scalable historical data for trend analysis and long-term projections.

realTimeMonitor.title: Real-Time Monitoring
realTimeMonitor.description: Heat map updated every second showing equipment availability for clients and administrators.

maintenanceAlerts.title: Maintenance Alerts
maintenanceAlerts.description: Predictive system that automatically generates tickets when equipment exceeds safe usage hour thresholds.

analyticDashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
analyticDashboard.description: Management panel with usage charts, stress peaks, underutilized equipment, and ROI calculation.

jwtSecurity.title: JWT Security
jwtSecurity.description: Robust authentication with JWT tokens to protect sensitive client data and operations.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us about your gym and your needs
